cards.p1.q: Would you go skydiving over your travel destination?
cards.p2.q: Would you rather climb a cliff face than take the elevator?
cards.p3.q: Would you try surfing even if you have never stood on a board?
cards.p4.q: Would you dive down to a coral reef or a shipwreck?
cards.p5.q: Is a motorcycle ride through unknown roads your kind of thing?
cards.p5.desc: Freedom and speed without a plan.
cards.p6.q: Does a full day at the spa with massage and sauna sound perfect?
cards.p6.desc: Total relaxation for body and mind.
cards.p7.q: Would you start your day with yoga at sunrise?
cards.p8.q: Is your dream day a hammock on the beach with a book?
cards.p9.q: Would you spend hours just watching the waves?
cards.p10.q: Are you drawn to hot springs and traditional baths?
cards.p11.q: Could you spend an entire day in a museum without getting bored?
cards.p12.q: Would you watch a local theatre performance even in another language?
cards.p13.q: Are you fascinated by ruins and archaeological excavations?
cards.p13.desc: The mysteries of the past pull you in.
cards.p14.q: Would you visit religious and spiritual sites regardless of your own beliefs?
cards.p15.q: Are you drawn to street art and alternative artistic expressions?
cards.p15.desc: The creative pulse of the city.
cards.p16.q: Are you the one always photographing architecture and details?
cards.p17.q: Would you eat street food from a stall you have never heard of?
cards.p17.desc: The best flavours are often the most unexpected.
cards.p18.q: Would you take a cooking class with a local chef?
cards.p18.desc: Learn the secrets behind local food.
cards.p19.q: Are wine tastings and local breweries something you prioritize?
cards.p19.desc: Drinking culture tells the story of a place.
cards.p20.q: Do you always order the most exotic dish on the menu?
cards.p21.q: Is a Michelin restaurant worth spending your travel budget on?
cards.p22.q: Do you always search for the best local coffee shop?
cards.p23.q: Would you hike 6 hours for the view?
cards.p23.desc: Earn the panorama with your own feet.
cards.p24.q: Would you sleep under the stars in the wild?
cards.p24.desc: Away from everything, close to everything.
cards.p25.q: Is a mountaintop sunrise worth waking up at 4am for?
cards.p26.q: Would you go whale watching or see wild animals in their natural habitat?
cards.p27.q: Does kayaking through silent fjords sound like a dream?
cards.p28.q: Would you join a local festival or celebration?
cards.p29.q: Would you rather meet locals at a bar than visit a monument?
cards.p30.q: Would you stay with a local host family instead of a hotel?
cards.p31.q: Do you prefer group tours over exploring alone?
cards.p32.q: Would you seek out live music regardless of genre?
cards.p33.q: Are you drawn to cocktail bars and speakeasies?
cards.p34.q: Would you dance all night at a local club?
cards.p35.q: Would you see a unique show — circus, cabaret, or performance art?
cards.p36.q: Is a luxury hotel with a view an important part of your trip?
cards.p37.q: Would you take a helicopter tour to see the landscape from above?
cards.p38.q: Does a private boat trip along the coast sound tempting?
cards.p39.q: Would you throw away the map and walk in a random direction?
cards.p40.q: Would you take a random bus and see where it ends up?
cards.p41.q: Are you drawn to neighbourhoods tourists never visit?
cards.p41.desc: Real life hides outside the city centre.
cards.p42.q: Do you like letting chance decide what you do today?
cards.p43.q: Would you take a workshop in something new — ceramics, dance, language?
cards.p44.q: Do you visit bookshops and libraries when you travel?
cards.p45.q: Do you try to learn a few words in the local language?
cards.p46.q: Are local markets and flea markets an important part of travel?
cards.p47.q: Do you always buy handmade souvenirs from local artisans?
cards.p48.q: Would you fill every day with activities from morning to night?
cards.p49.q: Do you prefer staying longer in one place over seeing everything?
cards.p50.q: Are you most active after the sun goes down?
cards.p50.desc: The night has its own magic.
cards.r1.desc: You like clean flavors and quality.
cards.r2.q: Can a simple pizza be the perfect dinner?
cards.r3.q: Do you often choose spicy food when you can?
cards.r3.desc: You enjoy heat and bold flavors.
cards.r4.q: Is it worth paying more for a “wow” dinner?
cards.r4.desc: You value quality, service and ambience.
cards.r5.q: Burger and fries as a go-to?
cards.r6.q: Do you often prefer something light and fresh?
cards.r7.q: Is a good wine list a big plus?
cards.r7.desc: You enjoy pairing drinks and food.
cards.r8.q: Do you like sharing small plates (tapas/meze)?
cards.r9.q: A proper steak dinner makes you happy?
cards.r10.q: Do you prefer romantic ambience over loud buzz?
cards.r11.q: Do you enjoy high-energy, lively restaurants?
cards.r12.q: Do you often want something quick and efficient?
cards.r14.q: Is dessert a must when dining out?
cards.r15.q: Do “local hidden gems” matter more than chains?
cards.r16.q: Do you like open kitchens/chef’s counters?
cards.r17.q: Do you love stews and comfort food?
cards.r18.q: Do you care about vegetarian/vegan options?
cards.r20.q: Does loud music while eating drain you?
cards.p51.q: Would you try bungee jumping if it is available nearby?
cards.p51.desc: A short fear. A long memory.
cards.p52.q: Does white-water rafting sound like a great day?
cards.p53.q: Would you try paragliding to see the landscape from above?
cards.p54.q: Would you join a via ferrata route (climbing with cables)?
cards.p54.desc: Climbing with a bit of extra safety.
cards.p55.q: Would you try sandboarding on the dunes?
cards.p56.q: Does a guided glacier hike sound tempting?
cards.p57.q: Would you hike a volcano to see the view from the top?
cards.p57.desc: When nature feels a little dangerous (in a good way).
cards.p58.q: Would you rent a scooter and explore without a fixed route?
cards.p59.q: Would you try kitesurfing if conditions are good?
cards.p60.q: Does mountain biking on trails sound like you?
cards.p61.q: Would you do a proper sauna ritual (hot/cold cycles)?
cards.p62.q: Would you go to a tea ceremony or “slow tasting”?
cards.p63.q: Does a float/saltwater spa sound like a perfect break?
cards.p64.q: Would you try a sound bath / sound meditation?
cards.p64.desc: Relaxation you can feel in your body.
cards.p65.q: Would you choose a simple park picnic over a “must-see” sight?
cards.p66.q: Do you actually prioritize getting a massage while traveling?
cards.p67.q: Would you rather do a calm sunrise outing than a late night?
cards.p68.q: Do you like setting aside time for journaling while traveling?
cards.p69.q: Does a calm “slow lunch” in a green spot sound like you?
cards.p69.desc: An hour that feels like three.
cards.p70.q: Do you value leaving room for a proper “do nothing” day?
cards.p71.q: Would you do a guided history walk (stories, not just facts)?
cards.p71.desc: A city makes sense when you know the stories.
cards.p72.q: Could you spend an afternoon on galleries and small exhibitions?
cards.p73.q: Is an opera/classical concert a great night out for you?
cards.p74.q: Would you do a photography workshop to learn to see better?
cards.p74.desc: A bit of technique, a lot of perspective.
cards.p75.q: Would you try a local dance class (even as a beginner)?
cards.p75.desc: Your body learns faster than your head.
cards.p76.q: Would you try an art/craft workshop (ceramics, painting, textiles)?
cards.p76.desc: Make something you actually bring home.
cards.p77.q: Do you enjoy visiting temples/churches for calm and architecture?
cards.p78.q: Would you go to a local cinema/outdoor movie while traveling?
cards.p78.desc: A small slice of everyday culture.
cards.p79.q: Would you join a language exchange night?
cards.p80.q: Would you do a food market tour with tastings?
cards.p80.desc: A lot of flavor in little time.
cards.p81.q: Would you prioritize a national park / day trip out of the city?
cards.p82.q: Does a waterfall trip (with some walking) sound like you?
cards.p83.q: Would you go stargazing somewhere with low light pollution?
cards.p83.desc: When the sky is the attraction.
cards.p84.q: Would you snorkel if the chances of seeing turtles/fish are high?
cards.p85.q: Does a sunrise hot-air balloon ride sound like a once-in-a-lifetime thing?
cards.p86.q: Would you join a birdwatching/wildlife walk with a guide?
cards.p86.desc: See more by knowing what you see.
cards.p87.q: Would you rather paddle calm waters than take a sightseeing bus?
cards.p87.desc: Silence and movement at the same time.
cards.p88.q: Could you sleep in a tent or simple cabin to be close to nature?
cards.p89.q: Would you go on a northern lights / night safari if the location is right?
cards.p89.desc: A night that pays you back.
cards.p90.q: Does a simple beach day with just swimming and sun sound like you?
cards.p91.q: Would you join a pub crawl if you are traveling with friends?
cards.p91.desc: A city through bars and conversations.
cards.p92.q: Would you do a volunteer activity (beach cleanup, community kitchen) while traveling?
cards.p92.desc: An experience that also gives back.
cards.p93.q: Do you like deciding what to do on the same day?
cards.p93.desc: The plan is a feeling, not a spreadsheet.
cards.p94.q: Could you take an impulsive train day trip to a nearby town?
cards.p95.q: Would you pay for a private driver/taxi to save time?
cards.p96.q: Do you like shopping local design (not just souvenirs)?
cards.p96.desc: Find something you will actually use later.
cards.p97.q: Does a rooftop bar with a view feel like a priority?
cards.p97.desc: An expensive drink that feels worth it.
cards.p98.q: Are you the type who likes to “maximize the day” with early starts and packed plans?
cards.p98.desc: A full calendar = a happy mind.
cards.p99.q: Do you prefer fewer things per day — but good things?
cards.p100.q: Do you happily buy last-minute tickets if something looks fun?
cards.r21.q: Do you love tacos with proper salsa and lime?
cards.r23.q: Is Indian curry (hot or mild) something you always look for?
cards.r24.q: Do you like paella/rice dishes meant to be shared?
cards.r25.q: Kebab/shawarma from a small spot: yes?
cards.r27.q: Do you crave authentic simple Chinese food (not just classic takeout)?
cards.r27.desc: When the menu has things you can’t pronounce.
cards.r28.q: If you do sushi, do you prefer omakase/tasting?
cards.r29.q: Is pasta a main reason you pick a restaurant?
cards.r30.q: Do you often choose a salad/bowl if there is a great option?
cards.r31.q: Do you hunt for brunch with pancakes/eggs?
cards.r32.q: Do you prioritize bakeries with proper croissants?
cards.r33.q: Is specialty coffee (pour-over/espresso) a small hobby for you?
cards.r34.q: Could you skip lunch and go all-in on a big brunch instead?
cards.r35.q: Is a really good sandwich/baguette a “yes” for you?
cards.r36.q: Do you get extra happy about seafood in a coastal city?
cards.r37.q: Would you order oysters if they look good?
cards.r37.desc: A bit of luxury, a bit of sea.
cards.r38.q: Do you prefer grilled fish over meat if you have the choice?
cards.r39.q: Is BBQ/smoked meats worth a detour?
cards.r39.desc: Smoke, sauce, and a bit of chaos.
cards.r40.q: Korean BBQ: do you like grilling at the table yourself?
cards.r41.q: Is falafel/gyros from a stall better than “fancy” sometimes?
cards.r42.q: Do you like eating at night markets or food streets?
cards.r43.q: Would you eat “fried stuff” if it looks amazing?
cards.r44.q: Is outdoor seating/terrace a big plus?
cards.r45.q: Rooftop or a view: do you prioritize that when you can?
cards.r46.q: Do you prefer low lighting and a calm atmosphere?
cards.r47.q: Do you like places with music and some buzz?
cards.r48.q: Do you like ordering a good wine/cocktail with your meal?
cards.r48.desc: Drinks are part of the experience.
cards.r50.q: Do you get easily tempted by the dessert display?
cards.r51.q: Are you often in the mood for vegetarian food when it is done right?
cards.r51.desc: Green can be heavy on flavor.
cards.r52.q: Is it important to find gluten-free options?
cards.r53.q: Do you like places that make things from scratch (sauces, bread, pasta)?
cards.r54.q: Do you like asking locals where they actually eat?
cards.r54.desc: You want away from tourist traps.
cards.r55.q: Do you get excited by “fermented” and “pickles” on a menu?
cards.r56.q: Is it important that it is easy to drop in without stress (and with kids)?
cards.r57.q: Do you value places where you can actually hear the conversation?
cards.r57.desc: Noise level matters more than you think.
cards.r58.q: Is “in and out quickly” a feature, not a bug?
cards.r59.q: Do you like smash burgers / simple diner spots?
cards.r60.q: Is grabbing a slice of pizza on the go perfect?
cards.r61.q: Do you like ordering many small plates instead of one main?
cards.r62.q: Do you enjoy tasting menus (many small courses)?
cards.r62.desc: Let the kitchen tell a story.
cards.r63.q: Are you willing to book far ahead for a top spot?
cards.r64.q: Are you okay paying more for ingredients and service?
cards.r65.q: Do you prefer a neighbourhood bistro over a trendy spot?
cards.r66.q: Is gelato/ice cream a travel tradition for you?
cards.r67.q: Pastry shops: do you prioritize them in new cities?
cards.r68.q: Do you like cafés where you can sit for a long time and people-watch?
cards.r68.desc: A chair, a cup, a city.
cards.r69.q: Is a bowl of noodle soup from a small spot a safe pick for you?
cards.r70.q: Do you like trying local drinks (bubble tea, lemonade, etc.)?
cards.r71.q: Do you like ordering the daily special to try something new?
cards.r71.desc: A bit of risk, often rewarded.
cards.r72.q: Do you think “order a bit of everything” is the best strategy?
cards.r72.desc: Many small yeses over one big decision.
cards.r73.q: Would you walk a bit further for a local favourite?
cards.r73.desc: You like to earn the meal.
cards.r74.q: Is a window table or a great view a big bonus?
cards.r75.q: Is good takeout a top-tier travel move?
cards.r76.q: Do you care about allergy/ingredient transparency?
cards.r77.q: Do you like places with a bit of a line and a “happening” vibe?
cards.r78.q: Do you prefer calm places with space between tables?
cards.r80.q: Do you like octopus/calamari when it is done right?
